Procedures_Required: Informed Consent, Demographics, Psoriasis History, Medical/Surgical History, Complete PE, VS (BP/HR/Temp/Weight), Labs (CBC/CMP/Hepatic/Pregnancy), PASI Scoring, BSA Calculation, IGA Assessment, Dermatology Photography (3 target lesions), DLQI Questionnaire, Pruritus NRS, Concomitant Med Review, Washout Verification
Staff_Required: Investigator, Coordinator, PASI Rater, Photographer, Phlebotomist
Notes: 12-hour fast not required. PASI rater must be certified. Photography per imaging manual.

Procedures_Required: Confirm Eligibility (re-assess PASI/BSA/IGA), Randomize via IVRS, VS, Dispense Study Drug (4-week supply), Application Diary Training, First Application Demonstration, AE Assessment (baseline), DLQI, Pruritus NRS, Optional Skin Biopsy (4mm punch × 2 sites)
Notes: Train patient on BID application technique. Demonstrate coverage and drying time.

Procedures_Required: AE Assessment (telephone), ConMed Review, Compliance Assessment (diary review), Application Technique Q&A
Notes: Telephone visit only. Document in source. No lab draws.

Procedures_Required: PASI Scoring, BSA, IGA Assessment, VS, AE Assessment, ConMed Review, Photography (target lesions), Pruritus NRS, Drug Compliance (tube weight + diary), Urine Pregnancy Test, Dispense Study Drug (4-week supply)
Notes: Collect used tubes. Weigh and record for compliance. Dispense new supply.

Procedures_Required: PASI Scoring, BSA, IGA Assessment, VS, Labs (CBC/CMP/Hepatic), AE Assessment, ConMed Review, Photography (target lesions), Pruritus NRS, DLQI, Drug Compliance (tube weight + diary), Dispense Study Drug (4-week supply)
Staff_Required: Investigator, Coordinator, PASI Rater, Photographer, Phlebotomist
Notes: Mid-study labs required. DLQI at this visit.

Procedures_Required: PASI Scoring, BSA, IGA Assessment, VS, AE Assessment, ConMed Review, Photography (target lesions), Pruritus NRS, Drug Compliance (tube weight + diary), Urine Pregnancy Test, Dispense Study Drug (4-week supply)

PASI Scoring (PRIMARY ENDPOINT), BSA, IGA Assessment, Complete PE, VS, Labs (CBC/CMP/Hepatic), AE Assessment, ConMed Review, Photography (target lesions — final on-treatment), Pruritus NRS, DLQI, Drug Compliance (collect ALL remaining drug), Serum Pregnancy Test, Optional Skin Biopsy (4mm punch × 2 sites)
Staff_Required: Investigator, Coordinator, PASI Rater, Photographer, Phlebotomist
Notes: PRIMARY ENDPOINT VISIT. Collect all remaining study drug. Ensure PASI rater consistency.

Procedures_Required: PASI Scoring (durability), BSA, IGA Assessment, VS, AE Assessment (ongoing + new), ConMed Review, Photography (target lesions — post-treatment), Pruritus NRS, DLQI
Notes: 4 weeks post-treatment. Assess durability of response. End of study visit.

Procedures_Required: Symptom-directed dermatology exam, VS, AE Assessment, ConMed Review, Photography (if indicated)
Notes: Document reason for unscheduled visit. May be triggered by AE or protocol deviation.

Visit_Name: * PASI rater must be the SAME certified rater for all visits for a given patient (rater consistency).
* Clinical photography must use calibrated dermatology camera system per imaging manual.
* All photography uploaded to central imaging portal within 72 hours.
* Tube weights recorded at dispensing AND return to calculate compliance percentage.
* Compliance threshold: < 80% or > 120% of expected usage triggers compliance counseling.
* ePRO diary (daily pruritus NRS) to be reviewed at every in-clinic visit. Alert if > 3 consecutive missed entries.
